PENGFUNAILONGMOD-PENGFU_NAILONG.title: Pengfu Nailong
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-PENGFU_NAILONG.descript:
A round little dragon whose feelings arrive all at once.
He swaps between expressions and bounces danger away with his soft belly.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-PENGFU_NAILONG.cardsMod: Pengfu Nailong cards will now appear in rewards and shops.
PENGFUNAILONGMOD-PENGFU_NAILONG.eventDea: The laugh is not over yet.
